title: Formula Help with Job Number Creation
excerpt: Hi! Quick question for everyone. I would like it when a new item is created, have a formula column generate a job number. Job number is equal to YYMMXX where XX is a count that resets to 01 on the first of every month.

posts.author: marks.mccabe (Mark McCabe)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! Quick question for everyone. I would like it when a new item is created, have a formula column generate a job number. Job number is equal to YYMMXX where XX is a count that resets to 01 on the first of every month.

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good luck with this!!! This has to be a Monday new column to fix that.
What we really need is a Custom ID column por pulses.
For more information see this previous requests:
https://community.monday.com/t/custom-numbering-of-pulses/855

Auto-ID column (more dynamic) Feature requests
+1 to above Added improvement: I would love the ability to make a prefix or suffix in an AutoID column, like you can in a numbers column. It could look just like the number column setting but just have the L/R justification and the ‘Type your own’ option. [image]
